title: The Killing Of Haiti’s President Heads to a U.S. Court. What to Know.
summary_full: Four men are accused in South Florida of plotting to kill President Jovenel Moise in 2021. His death plunged Haiti into chaos that continues today.
summary_public: Four men are accused in South Florida of plotting to kill President Jovenel Moise in 2021. His death plunged Haiti into chaos that continues today.
